prompt: Create a cinematic cyberpunk night street scene in a Japanese city after rain, shot in a wide 16:9 frame with a dark violet and electric blue color grade. In the left foreground, place one androgynous anime-style figure with pale silver-white messy shoulder-length hair, wearing an oversized glossy black jacket with faceted low-poly geometry, crouching or leaning forward with one hand near the chest and the other extended downward. Cover the character’s face with a flat opaque muted purple rectangular block, making the face completely unreadable. Render the character and nearby debris as angular crystalline low-poly fragments, with sharp triangular facets catching purple highlights. The background is a deserted wet intersection with reflective asphalt, shuttered buildings, neon-lit storefronts, distant red traffic lights, and deep shadows. Include exactly two prominent road signs on a pole near the center-right: a circular red-and-blue no-stopping sign above, and a rectangular one-way sign below with the text 自転車を除く 一方通行 and a left arrow. Add exactly 8 prominent glass-like polygon shards around the scene: one wireframe shard at the far left, one triangular shard at the lower left, one large triangle near the bottom center, one small shard near the character’s lowered hand, one small shard in the mid-right street, one large shard at the lower right, one wireframe shard at the far right edge, and one small shard floating near the curb. Use rain-slick reflections, subtle chromatic aberration, high contrast, noir atmosphere, and a glitchy digital-polygon aesthetic. Keep the scene empty of cars and pedestrians, with no readable text other than the road sign.
